ab: mo cihi ’o ohaeva’u atai ’o ongkosi, mitacu tomaska veaucni.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫atai，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is atai, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: a’o ho ohaeva’u lamza na’no kaebʉ pasunaeno.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: la’u kaebʉ yuhnguzu, homo seolʉa tosvo, lamza nʉtʉ ’o mimza conoemoo ho yuhnguzu.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: la’u kaebʉ ho mi’o ea faeva ci nanghia, temiala melʉ toehungu pasunaeno ho yuuhnguzu.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
